rulings.Case Title: LONNETTE ROBINSON ET AL VS. LARUE PERKINS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 02, 2019 line 1. RESPONDENTS LARUE PERKINS, PATRICIA ANDERSON, BETTY BOWSER'S Notice Of Hearing is continued to April 26, 2019. By no later than April 19, 2019 parties to file supplemental briefs addressing the following questions regarding "utilizing partners" occupying units located in San Francisco: 1. Are utilizing partners "tenants": (a) per common and state law; and (2) per SFRO? 2. Did the arbitrator determine whether utilizing partners are "tenants" (a) per common and state law; and (b) per SFRO? 3. Does SFRO apply to these tenancies? 4. Is there a determination by the arbitrator whether SFRO applies to these tenancies? If yes, what is the determination? 5. Assuming that SFRO protections apply, may the parties contract around the rent increase limitations? In the brief include the question followed by "Yes" or "No" response prior to any argument. Include all the relevant authority on point and citations to relevant sentences from the Award. Supplemental briefs shall not exceed 2 pages. No further briefing is allowed. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: JOHN RIERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing For Release Of Property From Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 02, 2019 line 2. PETITIONERS JOHN RIERA, LAURA RIERA'S Notice Of Hearing For Release Of Property From Lien is OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. Additionally, Proof of Service as to Roy Fisk appears to reflect an incomplete substitute service (documents left with Steven Fisk), not a personal service on Roy Fisk, an individual. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PHYLLIS SPARKS-MAGDALUYO VS. NEW PENN FINANCIAL, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-19-664101 WITH CASE CGC-18-568443
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 02, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF PHYLLIS SPARKS-MAGDALUYO'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-19-664101 WITH CASE CGC-18-568443 is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Motion filed on March 14, 2019. Proof of Service is executed on March 8, 2019 indicating that papers to be served were provided to a messenger on March 9, 2019, the day after the declaration was executed. March 9, 2019 was a Saturday. No proof of service by messenger(s) on file. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID TSAO VS. GENERAL TSO KITCHEN, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 02, 2019 line 11. DEFENDANT GENERAL TSO KITCHEN'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is DENIED. Borsuk v. Appellate Div. (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. ("¿we ¿hold that a motion to quash service of summons is not the proper remedy to test whether a complaint states a cause of action for unlawful detainer or service of a notice to pay or quit.")= (501/CFH)
